description_long: This hammer features a robust, rectangular metal head with a flat striking face and a slightly tapered end, ideal for delivering powerful blows. The head is dark gray, suggesting it is made of steel or a similar durable metal, and is securely mounted on a cylindrical wooden handle. The handle is a rich brown color, smooth, and straight, providing a comfortable grip for the user. The overall design is utilitarian, with no visible embellishments or ergonomic enhancements, making it suitable for heavy-duty tasks. The hammer appears clean and well-maintained, with no visible signs of wear or damage. Its proportions and construction indicate it is intended for general construction or demolition work in urban environments.
description: A sturdy hammer with a dark metal rectangular head and a straight brown wooden handle, designed for heavy-duty use. The tool is clean, simple, and functional.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the wooden handle and the rectangular metal head with a flat striking face.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the narrow profile of the hammer head and the circular cross-section of the handle.
description_view_2: Opposite side view revealing the other side of the metal head and the handle, mirroring view 0.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back of the hammer head and the end of the handle, with the head's width clearly visible.
attribute_handle_type: straight wooden handle, cylindrical, smooth surface, no visible grip enhancements
attribute_head_type: rectangular sledge-type metal head with a flat striking face and a slightly tapered end, no claws or peen
